violations.claim: In dry-run mode filed++ counts displayed issues, not GitHub-filed issues.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 144
; In dry-run mode filed++ counts displayed issues, not GitHub-filed issues.
; The return {filed, skipped, errors} implies GitHub activity that never occurred.
(declare-const num_issues Int)
(declare-const filed Int)
(declare-const github_issues_created Int)
; Transition: dry-run loop — filed incremented once per issue
(assert (>= num_issues 1))
(assert (= filed num_issues))
; Transition: dry-run branch skips fileIssue() entirely — zero GitHub issues created
(assert (= github_issues_created 0))
; Violation: filed signals N filings but github_issues_created = 0
(assert (not (= filed github_issues_created)))
(check-sat)
; sat → filed=3, github_issues_created=0: caller cannot distinguish dry-run from real

clause_history.clause:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 144
; In dry-run mode filed++ counts displayed issues, not GitHub-filed issues.
; The return {filed, skipped, errors} implies GitHub activity that never occurred.
(declare-const num_issues Int)
(declare-const filed Int)
(declare-const github_issues_created Int)
; Transition: dry-run loop — filed incremented once per issue
(assert (>= num_issues 1))
(assert (= filed num_issues))
; Transition: dry-run branch skips fileIssue() entirely — zero GitHub issues created
(assert (= github_issues_created 0))
; Violation: filed signals N filings but github_issues_created = 0
(assert (not (= filed github_issues_created)))
(check-sat)
; sat → filed=3, github_issues_created=0: caller cannot distinguish dry-run from real
